name: Mushroom Stuffed Chicken Breasts
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop the mushrooms.
2. Remove bones and skin from chicken breasts; halve (8 pieces) and pound flat.
3. Preheat oven to 350°F.
4. Melt 4 tablespoons butter in a skillet. Add chopped mushrooms, salt, and pepper; cook, stirring often until mushrooms are very dark and absorb all the butter.
5. Remove from heat. Add Italian seasoning, oregano, basil, and rosemary to bread crumbs.
6. Divide mushroom stuffing into 8 portions. Place a portion of stuffing in the center of each chicken piece. Roll up the chicken around the stuffing; place seam side down in a buttered shallow casserole/baking dish.
7. Melt remaining tablespoon butter over chicken. Sprinkle with remaining bread crumbs until all pieces are covered.
8. Mix sour cream with heated chicken broth and pour over chicken.
9. Bake for 45-60 minutes, or until lightly browned.
10. Optional: Add broccoli flowerets and/or chopped walnuts to the mushroom and breadcrumb mixture.
